ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-17-2018 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-28-2016 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-13-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Roger Marshall (via court call) for Lucy Gould.

The Court stated that counsel filed an amended petition but only needed to file a supplement. Mr. Marshall stated that they are asking to withdraw the amended petition and go with the supplement filed 6/20/16. The Court stated that it appears that the petition as supplemented can be granted, that it will review the order and that copies will be mailed to counsel.

Judge: Charlene P. Kiesselbach. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
